programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Reality sets in and the mental and physical stress of training camp hits the girls hard.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Super Bowl XXX MVP Larry Brown and current Dallas Cowboy Ryan Fowler school the training camp candidates with the ultimate football challenge. The girls are tested on their NFL knowledge and athletic skills on the field.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Beauty is the name of the game as the training camp candidates get major hair makeovers in preparation for their first solo publicity stills. But not everyone is picture perfect and by the end of the week, there will be a heartbreaking elimination.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The end of training camp is just around the corner and after Kelli's annual etiquette luncheon the girls are on their best behavior. A tough new choreographer introduces the girls to real dance technique with devastating results.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates find themselves in front of the camera for a crash course in how to deal with the media. The judges from the open call are brought back to have their final say.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The summer is coming to a close, and there are now 36 girls poised to become America's sweethearts. Kelli and Judy are concerned the team is not ready and there may have to be more cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of excited and anxious Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders hopefuls arrive at Texas Stadium for the preliminary auditions. After performing their freestyle dance routines for the judges, only half make it to the semi-finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final audition, the competition really heats up. Now, surviving candidates must go head-to-head against experienced veteran cheerleaders for a coveted spot in the DCC Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Making it this far is one thing - enduring Training Camp is another. The hopeful group of 43 is far from the final squad, and DCC Director Kelli Finglass quickly reminds them that there will be cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: The cutest puppies. Nonstop.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian's patients include a horse with infected hooves, while Peter Wright is worried about a pedigree cat that is in labour and also has to deal with an angry monitor lizard. The two vets find time to attend the Great Yorkshire Show.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian sets up a blood bank for baby alpacas, but collecting donations is harder than expected. Peter is woken at 2 am by an emergency call-out for a pregnant cow, and must be at his sharpest to deliver the calf safely.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian treats a seriously ill llama called Echo who isn't breathing well. After the tricky job of conducting his first llama chest X-rays, Julian can see there's fluid in Echo's lungs. And when he takes a sample, he doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Join us at the Dog Rescuers house as host Alan Davies throws the ultimate Christmas party for his doggy friends.

programme.title: Rescue Vet
programme.desc: Vets battle to save a carstruck Labrador. Plus, a soft-coated terrier is losing weight rapidly.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Cat playing with baby; dog takes football away; baby bounces on dog gets flipped.

programme.title: Going To the Dogs
programme.desc: The Bulldog Club holds its annual specialty show and costume contest.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Grey Seals, A Journey Of Survival
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the North Atlantic lives an animal that has adapted to major changes in its environment. Grey seals are adept at hunting fast, elusive prey and are one of Europe's largest predators.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: The dry forest, which once covered the entire Pacific coast of Central America, now exists only as isolated "vestiges". In Costa Rica, however, it has been revived and even expanded thanks to the efforts of biologists and the local population.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: From the Corcovado National Park, described by National Geographic as "the most biodiverse site on the planet", researchers and conservationists follow the so-called "green corridors" in search of key species.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: Costa Rica is home to some of the richest marine ecosystems in the world. Biologists and conservationists have undertaken a real race against time to better understand marine ecosystems and protect them.

programme.title: Hurricanes: Rise Of The Superstorms
programme.desc: Hurricanes are the strongest storms on earth. They can inflict losses of billions of dollars and thousands of lives. Beyond the hype that surrounds these dangerous events, are stories of significance to society, nature and the future.

programme.title: Life Stories: Behaviour For Life: Life Stories Special
programme.desc: The biggest show on Earth is wildlife in action. Fight, communicate, build, love, breed, and eat: these are the basic animal behaviours. This series treat them all, one by one.

programme.title: Lioness In Exile
programme.desc: Soon after we meet Manyari, Queen of her pride, she does something both unusual and bold. She leaves the sanctuary of the clan with her young cubs and takes them on a dangerous odyssey.

programme.title: Mountain Adventure: Out Of Bounds
programme.desc: Follow Olympian Torah Bright as she journeys through the world's longest chain of mountain ranges extending from Antarctica all the way to Alaska.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Embarking on a once in a lifetime cruise around the picturesque Caribbean, Nigel encounters the wildlife of the tropics.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel Marven embarks on thrilling voyages aboard cruise ships, scouring the wilds of Norway, Shetland, Iceland, the Faroe Islands, and Denmark in search of their unique wildlife.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores the azure waters of the Aegean Sea, traverses the scenic Greek Islands, and immerses himself in the splendor of Venice.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: In Audubon Park, Nigel marvels at the Three-toed Amphiuma and encounters the mighty alligator snapping turtle. Heading full speed ahead to Central America, he ventures into Corcovado National Park in search of the endangered jaguar.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel's Indian Ocean journey begins in Mumbai, where he spots Indian Flying Foxes and encounters extraordinary leopards. Amidst city life, a thrilling encounter with a real cobra electrifies all, making for a bold wildlife experience.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia despierta de una de sus pesadillas, quiere irse de la casa de Justino Briñón, le teme al misterio que lo envuelve, pero a él le interesa retenerla. Hayde muestra desacuerdo con su madre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no quiere compromisos y así se lo hace saber a la mujer con la que comparte, le dice a su madre que ha tomado una decisión. Justino le pregunta a Alicia cómo era su vida con Amador.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta cree que su exnuera ya no está en el pueblo, pero le preocupa que Sebastián no cambie de opinión. Justino sabe que es el momento de la revancha, le da órdenes precisas a Alicia.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo discute con Teresa Cristina, no quiere que Patricia viva un día más con ella. Teresa Cristina busca un arma y lo amenaza, forcejean y Reinaldo sale herido. Iris le aconseja a su sobrina que se vaya por un tiempo mientras todo se enfría.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Kike va en el auto con Kikito cuando ve a la mujer que lo engañó y trató de matarlo hablando con Fernando. Griselda decide sacarle información a Fernando sobre esa mujer. Este corre a alertar a Teresa Cristina de que Griselda descubrió todo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo insiste ante el detective que todo lo que pasó con Teresa Cristina fue un forcejeo y que se enfoque en los otros crímenes. Vanessa le confiesa a Griselda que nunca tuvo nada con Reinaldo, que no pasó de un plan para inculparlo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Gabriel habla con Esther, quiere saber qué significa él para ella. Fernando se entera que lo vinculan con la muerte de Marcela y amenaza a Teresa Cristina con grabaciones de los encargos que ella le ha hecho. Griselda busca a Reinaldo y lo besa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal Parker resulta ser un acucioso empresario que le gusta indagar en sus negocios. Marisa está casi en la quiebra, hasta que se convierte en una empleada en Manhattan. Por un accidente del destino y una confusión, conoce al príncipe de sus sueños.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Una empleada disfrazada de princesa termina paseando por Central Park con el hombre más deseado de la Gran Manzana. Marisa cautiva a Cristóbal, pero lo que empezó como una travesura termina en una cita inesperada con la huésped de la suite principal.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa tiene que enfrentar la realidad y renunciar a su sueño. Como camarera le toca atender el almuerzo accidentado entre Cristóbal y Sara, pero es testigo de la desesperación que tiene él por encontrar a la mujer que conquistó su corazón.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal está seguro de que Marisa aceptará su invitación a la gala benéfica de su madre. Ella se entera de que Sara se trae algo oculto con Cristóbal, mientras él se prepara para una nueva operación encubierta. Belinda amenaza a su esposo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta cree que su exnuera ya no está en el pueblo, pero le preocupa que Sebastián no cambie de opinión. Justino sabe que es el momento de la revancha, le da órdenes precisas a Alicia.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta está afectada al ver a la madre de sus nietos y enfrenta otro encuentro que le impresiona más. Justino le hace confesiones a Alicia, cuando ella se entera del rumbo de sus hijos.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia acepta ver a Laurentino cuando su hija Iluminada se lo pide, él le hace una insólita propuesta, Sebastián se altera por las travesuras de sus sobrinos, quiere cortar el problema de raíz.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Double Team
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme joins forces with NBA and media sensation Dennis Rodman in this action-packed thriller. Top counter-terrorist Jack Quinn is ready to get out of the spy game until the evil Stavros kidnaps his wife and unborn son.

programme.title: Kickboxer 2: The Road Back

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay intenta ayudar al restaurante italiano Trobiano's. Cuando Ramsay confronta al dueño sobre la limpieza de la cocina y el sabor de la comida, aumentan las tensiones.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los diez cocineros restantes deben hacer tapas con las sobras. Un error de un Chef hace que ambos equipos tengan un casi fracaso.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay desafía los paladares de los equipos en una prueba de sabor a ciegas. En un servicio de cena abarrotado, la ansiedad es mayor de lo normal cuando pasan las celebridades Eric McCormack y Robert Patrick.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El resto de los Chefs deberán preparar un plato a base de cangrejos y cada equipo presentará su plato más fuerte al Chef Ramsay. Durante el servicio de cena, los equipos crean sus propios menús.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay separa a los equipos. Ahora los seis Chefs restantes están solos, cada uno preparando un plato con catorce ingredientes simples.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de un viaje a Atlantic City Borgata, donde el ganador pronto será un gran Chef, los competidores deben preparar un plato original que se servirá en el aclamado hotel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay cocina para los cuatro Chefs restantes y luego les dice que repitan lo que han preparado. Posteriormente, se planea una propuesta de sorpresa para el menú de postres.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Kate and Oswald discover an obstacle to bliss - Lewis. After meeting Drew, Nicki's parents consider divorce.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 11/2/16: It takes extra innings, a rain delay and late-game heroics by Ben Zobrist and Miguel Montero for the Cubs to finally break the "Curse of the Billy Goat" and take home the 2016 World Series title, their first since 1908.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/3/16: For the first time ever in professional sports history, a regular-season game is played on an active military base. The Braves and Marlins faced off at Fort Bragg in North Carolina.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/17/16: Rockies rookie Jon Gray dominated the Padres, collecting a franchise-record 16 strikeouts in his first career complete game and shutout at Coors Field.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 7/16/2018 - Bryce Harper found himself as the hometown favorite when it came to the 2018 Home Run Derby at Nationals Park in D.C. The former MVP put on a show for the fans, taking down Freddie Freeman, Max Muncy and Kyle Schwarber on his way to a victory.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 4/3/18: On April 3, 2018 in his first-ever at-bat at Angel Stadium, Japanese phenom Shohei Ohtani crushes a three-run home run, earning himself a curtain call from the Los Angeles crowd.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: The Red Sox were down three runs and down to their final out against Aroldis Chapman in the 9th inning. After a pair of clutch at-bats helped tie the game, Andrew Benintendi hit a slow chopper in the 10th to walk it off against the Yankees at Fenway Park.

programme.title: MST3K: Time Chasers
programme.desc: A college professor and a reporter go through time in a modified light plane to stop a corporation from using his invention to accidentally create a dystopian future.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Screaming Skull
programme.desc: Newly-married wife Jenni can't tell if the skull she sees in her new home is a ghostly apparition of her husband's dead first wife, hallucinations from her own nervous condition... or something else.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Code Name: Diamond Head
programme.desc: Counterintelligence takes on new meaning in this barely coherent tale of Hawaiian espionage that takes place on movie sets meant to look like Hawaii.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Corpse Vanishes
programme.desc: In the theater, Joel and the Bots get the third installment of "Radar Men from the Moon" before the Bela Lugosi film "The Corpse Vanishes".

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Crawling Eye
programme.desc: Things start to look eerily familiar to scientists Crevett and Brooks when mountain climbers begin losing their heads in the Trollenberg Mountains.

programme.title: MST3K: The Crawling Hand
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a tough time agreeing on how to spend their free time between segments of the teen sci-fi thriller "The Crawling Hand".

programme.title: MST3K: The Atomic Brain
programme.desc: A rich, elderly woman wants her doctor to transplant her brain into the body of one of her young captives.

programme.title: MST3K: Teenage Caveman
programme.desc: In Teenage Cave Man (1958), a rebellious cave boy goes against clan rules and wants to explore horizons beyond the river

programme.title: Catfish México

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La doctora le informa a Karina que está gravemente enferma debido a su sangre. Mercedes llega cuando Silvano está besando a Rosaura y se mete reclamándole a Silvano que deje tranquila a Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Karina, desesperada, se toma una cantidad de pastillas para quitarse la vida. Silvano visita a Teobaldo. Él le va a contar lo de la niña pero se aparece Sonia y se calla por miedo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Maribella entran a la habitación de Rosaura para ponerle una sorpresa. María Julia le pide perdón a Iván por haber sido una mala madre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le da ánimos a Karina y le dice que lea la carta de Maximiliano. Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel lo que le pasó con Silvano y Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se cae del caballo y Silvano se acerca a él. Panchita le cuenta a Samuel todo lo que pasó, incluído lo que hizo Bruno dándole un caballo enfermo a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván y Rodrigo van a la casa de Eva y le sueltan en la cara que esa casa es de Karina, según el testamento de su papá. Silvano va a ver a Rosaura pero Doña Cruz le dice que se vaya.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura bota a todo el mundo de su oficina. Eduardo y Maribella se van pero Patricio se queda y le dice que quiere hablar con ella de la niña. Karina le dice a Eva que se va a morir.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio tiene en sus manos a Rosaura, con la excusa de entregarle a su hija. Luis Mario le promete a Maribella que le va a devolver todo el dinero que pagó por la hacienda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Camelia están dentro de la piscina, peleándose. Eduarda le comenta a Luis Mario que sigue enamorada de Patricio y que él debe olvidar a Rosaura y dedicarse a Maribella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura ve a Sonia y comienza a gritar, después choca contra un poste Jimena le dice a Iván que en la vida de ellos hay una realidad que es Adriana y Guillermo. Rosaura recupera el conocimiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio amenaza a Silvano con una pistola. Rodrigo llega a casa de Karina. Ella le dice que quiere curarse para mejorar y para quererlo. Luis Mario le cuelga el teléfono a Griselda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia aconseja a Patricio que encierre a Rosaura en un manicomio. Luis Mario y Maribella se besan y Luis Mario la llama Rosaura. Jimena le dice a Guillermo que prepare todo para el matrimonio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Teobaldito y Mairita hablan de sus familias cuando llega Rosaura con regalos para la niña, que supone es hermana del niño. Después llega Luis Mario, que viene a traerle merienda a los chicos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta a su abuela que está intentando recordar que fue lo que hizo con su hija y cuál fue el parque donde estuvo. Guillermo le propone a Jimena que no se casen.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats stop for supplies at a harbor town plagued by a mayor who taxes anything and everything. Over lunch, Luffy and Nico befriend a kooky scientist who’s obsessed with the Rainbow Mist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The showdown with Mayor Wetton builds towards an explosive finale as the Straw Hats scramble to escape the Rainbow Mist – or be trapped inside forever.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are nearly crushed by the falling wreckage of a ship that’s over 200 years old. Could rumors of a floating island in the sky be true? Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji go scuba diving to find out!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats drop anchor at a town overrun by scallywags, so Nami makes the boys swear to stay out of trouble. But when the Bellamy Pirates come looking for a fight, Luffy may have to break his promise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico’s handy work unearths a solitary dreamer who may know the way to Sky Island. All Luffy and his crew have to do is survive the sonic onslaught of simian salvagers seeking to sink the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats battle creepy-crawly forest creatures on their quest to capture a South Bird, Mont Blanc and his monkey minions are brutally attacked by the Bellamy Pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some modifications to the Going Merry, the Straw Hats are on their way to that island in the sky! But with the Blackbeard Pirates in hot pursuit, navigating the vertical currents will be anything but easy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Reaching the sea of clouds proves easier than surviving in it when giant sea creatures attack the Going Merry, Usopp nearly drowns in a cloud, and a strange sky knight issues the Straw Hats a warning!

programme.desc: After hitching a ride on a speedy shrimp, the Straw Hats reach the land of Skypiea! The intrepid pirates have much to learn about their new surroundings, but a beautiful angel makes a perfect tour guide.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th installment of the series pits Bond (Pierce Brosnan) against a powerful media mogul (Jonathan Pryce) and his wife (Teri Hatcher) who has a secret past with Bond.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Al servicio de su majestad
programme.desc: Cuando el Agente 007 encuentra por fin el amor verdadero, se sumerge en una emocionante aventura llena de acción y peligro espectaculares, protagonizada por George Lazenby como el carismático Bond.

programme.title: Vive y deja morir
programme.desc: James Bond lucha contra las fuerzas de la magia negra en esta aventura de alto impacto que lo lanza desde las calles de Nueva York hasta los pantanosos paisajes de Louisiana.

programme.title: El hombre del revólver de oro
programme.desc: James Bond ha sido marcado por la muerte y necesitará sus instintos letales y su seductor encanto para sobrevivir en esta gran aventura llena de acción.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: John Wick is on the run after killing a member of the international assassins' guild, and with a $14 million price tag on his head, he is the target of hit men and women everywhere.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: New Life: Born to Run
programme.desc: In a land of dangers, plant-eating animals are always at risk, and never more so than at the time of their birth; out on the open they are vulnerable and there are few places to hide. But luckily some are born to run...

programme.title: Walking Wild
programme.desc: Learning about black rhinos and elephant calves.

programme.title: Forests of our Earth
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work.

programme.title: Human Prey
programme.desc: What happens when dangerous caged animals break free? A visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle; an escaped tiger wreaks havoc at a lavish zoo fundraiser; and, an angry bull goes on a rampage at a 'bloodless' bullfight.

programme.title: Secret Nature
programme.desc: When flowering plants evolved on Earth, they gave rise to a new kind of insect that evolved from solitary hunting wasps into vegetarian bees, which have developed a myriad of different lifestyles and designs.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Amboseli, Soila and Katito take to the air to find Qualida, the elephant rescued from the mud trap. They spot her, but can't make out her calf. On its own, it will stand little chance of survival.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves (Dooya)
programme.desc: Meet the Galta gang, a 60-strong troop of rhesus macaques, as they make their way from their temple home through the streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: Wild Life: Nature's Erector Set
programme.desc: Explore the Pacific coast of Central America and take flight with these rollicking spectacles of nature.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew are back in Louisiana in search of the alligator snapping turtle!

programme.title: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums.

programme.title: Great Horses of the World
programme.desc: Talking to the Air takes us to the top of the world, drawing us into a land beyond time and the medieval culture of the Mustang in Nepal. This is the Shangri-La of horsedom, where wealth is measured in hoofed gold.

programme.title: Wild Animal Orphans
programme.desc: Even at a wildlife sanctuary, poaching can rear its ugly head. The team is on high alert to defend the animals they have come to know and love.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: The whales use a clever hunting technique called 'bubble feeding' to catch quantities of herring.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies.

programme.title: Life In A Tide Pool
programme.desc: Learn all about barnacles while exploring the tide pools at Crystal Cove State Park and visit the Cabrillo Marine Aquarium to learn how they grow and care for barnacles.

programme.title: Secret Nature
programme.desc: Ants have populated Earth for around 100 million years, and over time have developed into some of the most impressive animal associations around, almost rivalling the complexities of human societies.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson is quilled by a porcupine, finds a pine marten and runs into a grizzly bear!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote finally encounters and catches the one reptile that has eluded him for years: the spectacled caiman!

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A convenience store worker plays dead to escape her abductor. An endurance athlete faces her greatest challenge ever after falling 60 feet in a remote canyon.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The expedition moves off shore shadowed by a new fuel support boat. Mechanical mishaps cause a Jet Ski to sink. Steven’s back is against the wall.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Steven is forced to send a crewmember home. The expedition attempts to cross the South China Sea. Disaster strikes during a huge storm.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: The busy beavers of the wilderness serve as food and clothing for mountain man Laramy Miller.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Can Laramy survive the harsh conditions of elk country? With one misfire and a fresh blanket of snow on the mountains, the task of harvesting an elk for the winter is getting harder and harder.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy is on the hunt for elk in the mountains of Northeastern Washington.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: This week Laramy is in Ontario chasing after whitetails with his Hawken rifle and freshly made lead ammo.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew go tide pooling at night and discover three different species of huge sea cucumbers!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson freehandles one of the most creepy yet colorful spiders in the world!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers the most bizarre creature he’s ever found: a caecilian! Wait, a what?!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote gets face to face with one of the most beautiful snakes in the world: the eyelash viper!

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A grizzly bear charges a taxidermist, and a shark goes after a spearfisher.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A polar bear chases down a woman, and a bull shark attacks a triathlete.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Scott must thrust his arm down a crocodile's throat to remove a flip-flop.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul must combat deadly gators with only new volunteer Caroline to assist.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys look back at their most harrowing moments and close calls.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In the basement of a normal Maryland house one man keeps 50 of the world's most deadly venomous snakes, putting himself in mortal danger on a daily basis. In Mexico another man injects himself with deadly venom to keep himself alive.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In an 8th floor apartment in Miami Beach, one man raises a spotted hyena, putting himself in mortal danger. In Africa, a schoolteacher wakes to the sound of her own bones crunching as she is dragged away in the vice-like grip of a hyena's jaws.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and friends return to Pallet Town for a hero's welcome, only to be sent on another journey right away! Professor Oak is seeking a mysterious-looking Poké Ball, and he asks Ash, Brock, and Misty to find it for him.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Thanks to Jigglypuff's sleep-inducing song, the blimp carrying Ash and Misty back home goes off course and crashes on an island, where they meet a new friend named Tracey while trying to help a lost Lapras.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash, Misty, and Tracey arrive at Mandarin Island, Pikachu and Togepi turn against them and join a group of other angry Pokémon. When the misbehaving Pokémon disappear, Officer Jenny informs them that dozens of Pokémon have been reported missing!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves on Pinkan Island, home to numerous strangely colored Pokémon. Ash and Tracey are fascinated by these pink Pokémon…and so are the Team Rocket trio!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After joining a scientific expedition to investigate a Kabuto fossil, Ash and their friends soon find themselves facing a series of natural disasters!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: Meowth Rules!

programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: RiffTrax: Buffalo Rider
programme.desc: When you really stop and think about it, there are two kinds of movies: movies where rugged men punch mountain lions, and movies where this sadly does not happen.

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: A Christmas Carol (Coronet)
programme.desc: Since every entertainment franchise that has ever existed has put out their own version of A Christmas Carol, it's only fitting that the maniacs at Coronet Films decided to make their own. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Jack-O
programme.desc: What was your favorite Halloween tradition? The candy? Or visiting a middle-aged guy's Haunted Garage? Jack-O strongly posits that the last one was a part of many childhoods. This is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by the guys from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Mutant
programme.desc: Not so much the X-Men kind of mutant, and not so much the Teenage Ninja Turtle kind of mutant, Mutant is all about that most iconic form of mutant: the one that seems a lot like a zombie.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Braniac
programme.desc: Back in 1661, a Spanish baron in the middle of burning at the stake escaped by hitching a ride on a passing comet, as one does. And now he returns, 300 years later, a shapeshifting monstrosity bent on killing the descendants of those who wronged him.

programme.title: Rifftrax Shorts: Why Doesn't Cathy Eat Breakfast?

programme.title: RiffTrax: Lycan Colony

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un niño es llevado a la sala de emergencias luego de sufrir un horrible accidente. Su cabeza está cortada y los médicos corren para salvar su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos víctimas de accidentes automovilísticos, un hombre y una mujer, llegan por separado y casi desnudos, pero gradualmente se revela su historia de pasión e infidelidad; Se descubre que un niño que sufre de náuseas tiene un bloqueo cardíaco.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Mano Separada del Artista. Lejía en los ojos. Ataque de insecto en el oído. Hombre tiene un accidente con un aerosol y le entra por la boca.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un golfista que no responde necesita una cirugía inmediata para salvarle la vida; 3 adultos casi desnudos causan estragos en la sala de emergencias; y un corredor de maratón empuja sus límites demasiado lejos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de emergencias fuera de servicio diagnostica su propia enfermedad crítica mientras se dirige al hospital.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre con picazón por la exposición al roble venenoso resulta que también tiene gusanos excavando en una herida en su espalda; una mujer joven tiene un labio sangrante.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una tortuga caimán mordedora está sujeta al cuello de un hombre y no la suelta; un médico de emergencias corre contra un huracán inminente; y un podador de árboles está a 20 pies sobre el suelo cuando es atravesado por su motosierra.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Accidentes automovilísticos en el hospital. Dos embarazadas, plus medicinal. Gancho en el cuello. Polvo de ángel para oídos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer se queja de dolores de estómago después de comer papel higiénico; un recluso tiene fiebre de 108 grados.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente psiquiátrico tiene un amor extremo por el budín de chocolate; un paciente en shock anafiláctico puede ser alérgico a su novia, y un hombre con una cara extrañamente hinchada debe ser convencido para recibir tratamiento.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: After visiting his brother in Florida, Barton decides to move there permanently much to the surprise of his family. Meanwhile, a huge storm and Barton's estranged wife Della prepare to roll into St. Louis. To Be Continued.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While rehearsing for a battle of the bands, Rick poaches away talented lead singer Joy, leaving Melanie, Victoria and Elka no choice but to use autotune microphones.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy learns from a fertility clinic director that Rick is their most sought-after donor, and Victoria method-acts as an old woman to land a prestigious stage role.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Looking for "GBFFs" like they had in L.A., the women go to a gay bar, where Victoria is mistaken for a drag queen, and Elka punches out her former best friend.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria tries to convince her daughter Emmy not to release a tell-all book, while Melanie and Joy are screened by a kid to be his father's new wife.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: At a party to celebrate getting his GED, Jung can't ignore his feelings for Shannon. Meanwhile, Janet grows tired of standing in her brother's shadow.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After Chris gets his driver's license, Rochelle and Julius give him permission to buy a car, but when the car is stolen and vandalized Chris realizes owning a car is a huge responsibility.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris decides to take a stand against his mother, Rochelle and refuses to do his household chores, causing Rochelle to complain to Julius that her son is disrespecting her.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris works up the courage to ask Tasha to be his girlfriend and is surprised when she accepts. Unfortunately, Chris had no clue that being a boyfriend entailed giving up all his free time and only doing things that Tasha wants to do.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris accidentally hits Greg while test driving the janitor's car, landing Greg in the hospital with a broken leg. Meanwhile, with both of Greg's parents out of town, Rochelle decides to skip the family vacation so she can take care of Greg.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to save the day when the citizens of Balsa become zombies. Then, Scaredy shows Dave that a life without farting could still be a good life.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy and Paddy get into a prank war. Scaredy helps Dave find the perfect job when he runs out of quarters for his fire truck.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: After losing a tooth, Scaredy makes the mistake of trying to trick the Molar Owl. Then, Scaredy discovers that mild-mannered Mildred has a secret.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: If Scaredy can't hide the stain on his uniform, it's big trouble. Then, a cowlick that just refuses to be tamed shakes Scaredy's confidence.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy and Dave's lucky penny is bad luck for both of them. Then, Scaredy discovers running the Stash N' Hoard isn't as easy he'd imagined.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy and Dave's friendship hits a bump when Dave becomes friends with the Paddle Dogs. Then, Scaredy loses Richard.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy must fight for his job after Paddy begins working at the Stash N' Hoard. Then, a new toy becomes a craze in Balsa and Scaredy is desperate to be included.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy tells Heloise about the magic of snow, she sees an opportunity to infuriate Lucius. --- Jimmy defends the adorable but evil Weavils when their habitat is threatened by Lucius’ construction plans.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Lost in Clownburg, Jimmy finds himself hassled by a pack of ill-tempered rodeo clowns. --- When an emergency at Misery Inc. keeps Lucius from his date with Jez, he bribes Jimmy and Beezy to keep her occupied.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy is fed up with Heloise and Beezy’s constant bickering, so he arranges a contest to see who can make nice. --- Jimmy has saved Lucius’ life, so Lucy must now scramble to endanger Jimmy’s life and return the favor.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: The young Skylanders serve a day of guard duty at Cloudcracker Prison.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: After battling Kaos, Stealth Elf finds herself caught inside his mind and must find a way to escape.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Eruptor must learn to control his temper after he continually jeopardizes team missions.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: The team learns Pop Fizz used to be a rock star, one half of the duo "Pop and the 'Gang".

programme.title: Skylanders Academy

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: After over-using an invention called the "evil-scope"to predict and stop evil before it happens in all the Skylands, Spyro finds himself caught inside a swirling ball of the collected evil energy.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop wants a holiday ceasefire so he can enjoy a normal Christmas with Dad, Millie and his grandparents. // Coop wants a holiday ceasefire so he can enjoy a normal Christmas with Dad, Millie and his grandparents.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop catches a nasty cold and has to stay home from school alone with Kat. // Coop and Dennis perform a magic show and make Kat disappear.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.desc: Tyler puts pressure on Cate to lose her pregnancy weight. Things boil over between Amber and Matt in Vegas. Maci worries about Bentley's safety while in Ryan's care and Debra attempts to go into business with Farrah.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber's family questions Matt's intentions when his past is revealed. Catelynn leaves Nova under April's care. Maci and Taylor find their dream home. Simon meets Sophia and Farrah pressures him for an engagement.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
