programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El dolor y los celos colman a Verónica. La nueva patrona admite que sus sentimientos por el mayor de los Beltrán perduran. Patricia le confiesa a Verónica su pasión. Irene critica a su madre por adúltera y Antonia también la desacredita en público.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro visita a la Patrona, pero ella lo rechaza. Ramiro echa a Prudencia de su casa y Julio ya no la quiere; en la calle todos señalan a la adúltera. Constanza sufre por su hijo y pone en riesgo el plan. Verónica convoca a los Lobos a su casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Prudencia muere a mano de los Lobos, pero antes tiene un encuentro con Verónica. Gertrudis y Lucas participan en el plan para acabar con la madre de Patricia. Alejandro le reclama a su madre por vigilarlo. Antonia invita a Max a vivir en la casa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente miedo y culpa tras matar por primera vez a una persona. Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de la muerte de Prudencia. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por su pérdida. Maximiliano y Valentina tienen un encuentro íntimo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes están impresionados con Ruth por su parecido con Libia, ella se interesa por uno de ellos, Eva se acerca a pesar de las advertencias de Gabriela. Sara descubre a Norma con Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se emborracha, él se disculpa con Norma pero la tensión entre ellos es cada vez más explosiva y comete una locura. Rosario regresa al bar Alcalá y discute con Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth invita a Óscar a una exposición, Jimena no controla los celos que siente por su cuñado. Aumentan los conflictos entre los hermanos Reyes, Juan se opone a la manipulación de su hermano.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se enfrenta a Armando al saber que fue él quien golpeó a Franco, Fernando le explica a la familia Elizondo por qué existe un pleito entre ellos, a Jimena le cuenta lo que pasa con Rosario.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Sofía acusa a Gaspar de la muerte de Gustavo. José la amenaza con contarle todo a Paula si ella no retira la denuncia. Juan ve a Pedro y a Julieta besándose y los echa de la cabaña. Modesto atiende una llamada y pregunta si es Don Emilio.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula hacen público su amor ante los del Monte, en el momento en que dos amantes quedan al descubierto. Sofía retira la denuncia contra Gaspar, pero persuade a Efraín para que le den una golpiza a José por una alta suma de dinero.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta reitera su amor por Juan, moviendo fibras que no imagina, pues hiere a Pedro sin saberlo y despierta los celos de Paula. Los hermanos reaccionan con inconformidad porque Juan y Paula ya habían formalizado la relación.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El dolor y los celos colman a Verónica. La nueva patrona admite que sus sentimientos por el mayor de los Beltrán perduran. Patricia le confiesa a Verónica su pasión. Irene critica a su madre por adúltera y Antonia también la desacredita en público.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Born in the U.S.A
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with homegrown adventures, from right here in the ole U. S. of A! Moose, cougars, gators and even an underwater adventure from America’s 50th state!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his wife Sue as they pay a visit to the sunny state of Florida's most unique and inspirational retirement home. They meet up with an amazing couple who is spending their golden years providing a safe and peaceful retirement for horses.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets up with researchers on the front-lines of animal conservation as they work to protect Elephants, Lions, Rattlesnakes, Bats and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Check out this adventure to the Atacama Desert in Chile, where Jack searches for wildlife in the most unlikely of places, and gets a first-hand look at what it's like to live in this harsh yet beautiful environment.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack encounters reptiles including an Eye Lash Viper, a huge Python, and the deadly Bushmaster at the World of Snakes. On the Caribbean coast, Jack meets an American couple who has established the Sloth Rehabilitation Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to his home state of Tennessee! He meets a one-of-a-kind farm animal living life to the fullest with a prosthetic leg, and a dedicated caregiver who's helping loads of native species get a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The creatures on today’s show are some of the rarest in the wild. Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the pink river dolphin, wooly Sichuan Takin, Fiji’s crested iguana, sun-tailed monkey and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: ack and Kathleen visit Joaquin's massive farm outside Guayaquil where he provides a haven for 45 species of animals native to Ecuador, including endangered spectacled bears, tapirs, and great green macaws.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with delicious and nutritious adventures. From carnivores like jackals, lions, and sharks to our vegetarian friends, the elephants, Jungle Jack is gearing up for a Feeding Frenzy!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading back to school! Join in as he meets up with the zookeepers of tomorrow at the Santa Fe Teaching Zoo in Gainesville, Fla. where he gets a lesson in training a kookaburra, shifting a trio of Galapagos tortoises, and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Smarts
programme.desc: Today’s animals are headed to the top of the class! Jungle Jack counts down some of nature’s most clever creatures, like dolphins, chimpanzees, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his grandson on safari to Tanzania's Selous Game Reserve, the largest reserve in Africa. They encounter territorial hippos, nesting crocodiles along with elephant, giraffe, impala and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wickedly Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along if you dare as Jungle Jack is counting down hair-raising true stories from the sea, land and air! Face-to-face encounters with bats, caiman, snakes, plus real dragons, on this Wickedly Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In rural Ohio, Jack gets behind the wheel to experience “The Wilds,” the largest zoological reserve in North America.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join the Hanna family as they literally see-through this species, release an endangered sea turtle and learn just how important bats are to the ecosystem…and to inspecting Jack's hair!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins the massive operation to relocate several Big Horns from Tonto National Forest to the Catalina Mountains in an effort to reintroduce the animals back into their native range.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Marsupials
programme.desc: From hairy-nosed wombats and legendary white wallabies to red kangaroos and fierce Tasmanian devils, this Wild Countdown hops along with ten magical moments with marsupials!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack joins the conservationists racing to save incredible species from extinction. Sea Turtles, Giraffe, Painted Dogs, Cheetahs, Whooping Cranes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along on an epic adventure to meet the big cats of Tanzania. These top predators include Lions, Cheetahs, and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.desc: Jamie cooks chili.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie creates a sausage pie using golden mashed potatoes instead of pastry, and gives fish and chips a healthy makeover.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie has some cracking family recipes to share; for a new take on using delicious sustainable white fish, Jamie rustles up gorgeous smoked haddock fish cakes, served with a beautifully creamy chive sauce that can't fail to impress.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Going meat-free a couple of days a week has got the Oliver household trying new ways of using vegetables in the dishes everyone knows and loves, so Jamie has pulled out all the stops for his mushroom toad-in-the-hole.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: Jam jar prawn cocktails with a lemony avocado sauce; two veggie quiches served with a garlicky courgette and couscous salad; tangerine drizzle cake.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: Jamie beautifully reimagines steak and chips -- and to top it off, caramelized pineapple tartlets.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.desc: As the Governor's impending attack looms, Rick and the others consider whether the prison is worth defending; Andrea struggles to escape captivity.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.desc: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.

programme.desc: Rick faces a number of threats while Carl and Michonne look for supplies; Glenn and Tara meet strangers on an important missio; other group members deal with their pasts.

programme.desc: Shane hace un sacrificio mortal que provoca un comportamiento extraño y autodistanciamiento. El resto del grupo intenta resistir en un punto medio entre vivir para morir y morir por vivir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Preocupados por su seguridad, el grupo idea un plan, uno con el que Hershel no está para nada de acuerdo. Él deja bien claro que el grupo puede quedarse por ahora, pero no de forma indefinida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn, el único que rompe barreras entre ambos grupos, sabe mucho más de lo que le gustaría. Daryl descubre una señal de vida y, en su delirio, intenta regresar vivo a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se cuentan y se revelan secretos. Hershel se niega a reconocer la nueva realidad del mundo. Andrea sale de su coraza. Todos están más y más conscientes de que "todo es alimento para algo".

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y los demás tratan de restablecer el orden después de un descubrimiento terrible. Hershel retoma un viejo hábito y desaparece, Rick y Glenn deben seguirlo a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atrapados, Rick, Hershel y Glenn luchan por sobrevivir contra nuevos enemigos, tanto muertos como vivos. Shane encuentra a Lori en peligro en el camino y se impone la misión de llevarla de vuelta a la granja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Shane entran en conflicto por el destino de un extraño. Andrea ayuda a la hija menor de Hershel a enfrentar una decisión de importancia crucial.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se pone del lado de Shane en una decisión importante, haciéndole pensar a Dale que el grupo está perdiendo humanidad. Las acciones de Carl tienen consecuencias no planeadas para el grupo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo se entera de que alguien peligroso puede andar suelto cerca de la granja. A medida que cae la noche, Rick, Shane, Daryl y Glenn revisan a fondo el bosque para manejar la situación y mantener al grupo a salvo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carl encuentran la granja en peligro; el grupo está dividido y en estado de caos; se cuestiona el liderazgo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El mundo es cada vez más peligroso, el embarazo de Lori avanza y Rick descubre un refugio potencialmente seguro. Pero primero deberá asegurar las instalaciones y llevar al resto del grupo al límite.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras un evento traumático, una vida pende de un hilo. Para complicar aún más las cosas, el grupo deberá además enfrentar una probable amenaza en este nuevo entorno.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de ser testigos de un accidente, Andrea y Michonne llegan a una nueva comunidad de sobrevivientes. A medida que se producen conflictos con sus nuevos compañeros, deben tomar una decisión.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon visit a town named Justice during Law and Order Seek and find it the site for a convention of criminals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to free a fellow agent from Devil's Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is kidnapped by a madman who plans to create an underwater kingdom that will control the world's shipping lanes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The evil, diminutive Dr. Loveless impoverishes an Indian tribe so that he can become their benefactor -- and their god.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fail to save the life of a highly unpopular Latin American dictator they have been assigned to guard.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon seek the reason why the life of a federal judge is being threatened.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West is tried by a court of cutthroats who believe he has murdered his friend and fellow agent, Artemus Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon tangle with an ex-confederate colonel who possesses the power to control the fourth dimension.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon encounter an old adversary who has found the secret of turning objects into gold.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to escort the Sultan of Ramapurand his sacred white elephant, a gift to President Grant.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A brass handrail is created. Mauro paints a chalkboard finish. Repaired balusters get reinstalled. Richard gives a lesson in make-up air. Work begins on a custom table. Heath talks smart electricity.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is complete on the Cape Ann Shingle Style project. The team tours the finished home, celebrating all of the repaired historic details and the new elements that keep with its original style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: We take a tour of some of the past This Old House project kitchens. Follow the evolution of appliances from white to stainless as well as cabinet finishes from natural to painted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From large scale industry to small town makers, these factories provide the materials for our projects.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From young blacksmiths metalworking to a woodworker who finds centuries-old lumber under water, This Old House features talented makers all over the country who make beautiful household items.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From demo day to design, we follow every step as the homeowners decide on the components and the crew converts a decades-old butler's pantry kitchen into an up-to-date kitchen for the future.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The guys begin restoration of an 1887 Queen Anne Victorian Cottage. Kevin hears about preserving historic details while updating the interior space and creating a new garage and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Decorative Queen Anne style barge rafters are reproduced for the garage addition. The antique windows get restored and primed in the shop, re-glazed, and then returned to the house for installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Bricks are cleaned and repurposed for a new chimney. Staggered shingles are reapplied. Kevin O'Connor learns about glass orbs hidden on Block Island. Richard Trethewey shows a new shower drain.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: After months of meticulous restoration, the stained glass windows are ready to be reinstalled. Electrician Ben has an apprentice. Tom re-creates original shingles. Landscape meeting with homeowners.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original house details such as the Yankee Gutters and corbels are installed. Kevin O'Connor catches up with the electrician's apprentice. Richard Trethewey looks at the new tankless hot water system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark McCullough explains cobblestone aprons. The crew reinforces floor joists. Tom Silva and Jeff Sweenor install a drop finial and a swinging window. Kevin O'Connor meets with paint experts.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ceiling mounted speakers disappear in plaster. The new HVAC system gets turned on. New garage doors are side mounted. The pool is lowered into place. The homeowner makes kitchen design choices.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Inside, the team is busy with floor installation, and the design plans for the master bath are finalized. Outside, a custom pizza oven and fireplace arrive, as well the plants and the new pool cover.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom assists with interior window trim and custom storm windows. Richard checks out an electric meter and panels. Mark follows work on the hardscape. Kevin watches the assembly of a decorative shed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Trees and sod are transplanted with Jenn, while a custom deck hatch is installed to access the basement. Inside, Kevin and Jeff assemble a smart lock system and Tom helps mount a unique range hood.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work happens in the kitchen. Kevin and Tom tackle the molding. The pantry gets a secret door. Countertops, backsplash and tile are installed. A new wood mantle goes around the gas fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The abandoned Seaside Victorian Cottage is restored to its original beauty. A new addition matches the existing architectural details. New hardscape and landscape anchor it to the corner lot.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn creates a patio building team. Heath rewires a section with intact plaster. Charlie and Tom hang a fire rated door. Richard explains how a tub fits in. Kevin and Tom install a replacement window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works with new apprentices. Kevin meets them and learns about YouthBuild. Homeowner Carol looks at kitchen cabinets and counters. Richard works with James on separate HVAC systems.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro works with the apprentices to fix plaster damage. Richard meets plumber Ronnette about the new sprinkler system. Carol and her sister shop for tile. The glass doors get repaired by an expert.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets caught in an exasperating willpower contest with Chrissy to determine whether he can give up women for longer than she can give up food.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls and secret meetings lead Jack, Janet, and Chrissy to believe that Helen Roper is having an illicit fling with her husband's best friend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Overprotective Janet goes into a rage when she finds Jack in the same bed with her attractive sister - who is visiting.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet face the danger of losing Chrissy to a fast-talking guru who dazzles her into believing her place is at his side - in a distant commune.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack finds himself in hot water when best friends Larry's girl says she still has a mad crush on him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet are up in arms when Chrissy announces that she is leaving on an overnight business trip with her new boss.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet and Chrissy angrily blame Jack for sending them on a wild goose chase to a nonexistent party, never dreaming that it is the Roper's teenage house guest who wants them out of the way so she can have all to herself.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet are shocked as evidence mounts that Chrissy seems compelled to steal, not only from them but also from the Ropers.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Landlord Stanley Roper plays such a dirty trick on Jack, Janet, and Chrissy that his wife walks out on him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes Janet and Chrissy are going to oust him from the apartment when their former roommate suddenly shows up.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet and Chrissy think it's great when they learn that Jack is dating a "fantastic" older woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy is in hot water with landlord Stanley Roper when he eavesdrops and believes she is pregnant.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy nearly loses her job when Jack tries to save her from the lecherous advances of the firm's president.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Janet is terrified by a mouse in her bedroom, Jack takes advantage of the situation by offering to move in with Chrissy until the rodent is captured.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet invites an attractive man to the apartment, expecting that they will be alone, but to her surprise, she finds Jack and Chrissy in the bedroom.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy accidentally eats the pie that Jack was entering in a statewide baking competition and then tries to substitute a ringer from the bakery.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: While Stanley Roper is selling the apartment building as a wedding anniversary surprise, his wife catches him with the attractive real estate agent and believes her marriage is breaking up.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack angrily leaves and becomes a live-in cook for Larry's boss and his passionate wife. Guest Star(s): John Larroquette

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Using Janet and Chrissy as allies, Jack pretends he lives alone when he falls for a girl he thinks is "old-fashioned.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack Tripper, a chef for all seasons, turns out to be quite a dish himself when he disguises himself as roommate Chrissy to skirt FBI agents on his trail.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy finds out that Jack has become a male escort and is running around with an older woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the roommates meet their new landlord they discover they have accidentally sold all his furniture, thinking it was the Ropers!

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy gets a new job selling cosmetics door-to-door, and unexpectedly finds herself in Ralph Furley's winner-take-all strip poker game.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: It's no more "Mr. Nice Guy" after Jack learns how to get his way with Chrissy and Janet.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Terrestrial Defense Force presumed that incidents of human disappearing is done by alien, and sent out the elite team "Ultra Guard" for investigation. However, a mysterious wanderer appeared in front of Furuhashi and Soga.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Ultra Guard member Ishiguro is back from Space Station V3. Dan sent him home and found Tilsonite 808, something that does not exist in Earth, in Ishiguro's yard. That night, incidents of people being attacked happened one after another.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Dan and Furuhashi headed towards Kisodani for investigation of a mysterious object that fell down. The object was found out to be a spaceship, and a girl from the spaceship stole Dan's Ultra Eye.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: Nuclear Ship Max, the most advanced scientific research ship of TDF, went on an investigation of the serial ship disappearing incidents. However, NS Max disappeared as well! The vanished ships were sent into space by Alien Godola...

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: World-famous scientist Professor Yushima came to Japan, on a trip to attach the Yushima Diode to the TDF Far East Base. However, Professor Yushima has already been brainwashed by Alien Vira!

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: A black shadow appeared in Anne's private room. The shadow told Anne that he was an alien, but had no intention to harm humans. At the same time, a message was sent from Outer Space City Pegassa, saying that they had a system trouble.

programme.title: Ultraseven
programme.desc: A mysterious monster appeared and attacked citizens one by one. The criminal was identified to be the atrocious criminal 303 from Planet Quraso, who broked the prison of his home planet and escaped to Earth.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Daigo finds a strange man who wants to buy a monster. The man was told to see Director Eiji Tsuburaya about anything concerning monster, and disappears into a mysterious light.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Daigo is plagued by nightmares of the world being swallowed up by darkness. Then Monster Zoiger appears from ancient ruins as if to make this nightmare a reality. GUTS deploys, but are troubled by the super-fast Zoiger.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: The world is thrown into chaos when Zoiger appears all over the Earth. Then the powerful demon, Gatanothor, emerges from beneath ancient ruins with plans to shroud the planet in darkness. Is humanity doomed to being swallowed up into darkness?

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Tiga is defeated! As people mourn, GUTS executes a plan to use a Light Gene Converter developed by Evil Tiga Masaki to convert the power of the Maxima Overdrive into a beam and save Tiga who has been turned back into a stone statue by Gatanothor!

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: Experiments are underway to find the means for Xio officers to turn monsters into Spark Dolls. The monster Black King strikes, with Daichi and X uniting to fight it, but the Alien Nackle uses this opportunity to steal the Spark Dolls from Asuna.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: A young man named tE rU is causing a commotion in the city. When he goes inside the mechanical giant Rudian begins to march on the city. But after seeing tE rU heal an injured girl, Daichi unites with Ultraman X and attempts to stop Rudian.

programme.title: Ultraman X
programme.desc: X is turned to stone by the dark beast Gargorgon, who has arrived to take the energy from Planet Gold stored within Rudian. Having escaped to Earth from Gold, tE rU laments how Daichi and X were petrified while protecting him.

programme.title: Ultraman Orb The Origin Saga
programme.desc: The royal planet of Kanon is in peril. An individual who introduces himself as Doctor Psychi has unleashed the Space Devil Bezelve horde, and insists that they turn over Queen Amate or witness the destruction of their long-treasured Tree of Life.

programme.title: Ultraman Orb The Origin Saga

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie is the new WOW World Champion! After last week's shocking conclusion, the drama comes to a boiling point between friends The Fabulous Lana Star and The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie finally gets her championship moment after the WOW World Championship belt is taken back from the thieving Lana Star. But not without a rematch against Penelope Pink - set for The Main Event. Will Aussie's reign end as soon as it's begun?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast finally speaks after discovering the identity of her attacker and WOW fans hear how she plans to enact her revenge for the brutal attack. Chainsaw's erratic behavior continues as she takes on Jennifer "Jen Z" Florez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy finally breaks her silence about her actions against The Beast before the two women meet in the ring, while the Mother Truckers: Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag get another chance for comeuppance against Las Bandidas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie vows to be a new kind of fighting champion as she defends her title against challenger Tormenta. Adriana Gambino makes a case for a WOW World Championship opportunity in her match against Stephy Slays, while BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Mother Truckers are pleased to offer their services to WOW Owner David McLane as he strives to return order to WOW - by volunteering to handcuff themselves to managers Lana Star and Sophia Lopez in the Main Event Tag Match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast seeks revenge in the worst way with a warning from the Fabulous Lana Star to remember before one embarks on the journey of revenge one should dig two graves. This main event match is too dangerous for WOW to sanction.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonga Twins face the most difficult challenge to date. Chainsaw aims to continue her path of destruction against Stephy Slays - will anyone in the locker room be able to control her? Team Spirit looks to gain both momentum and recruits in their match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The roadside dining, truck stop-loving Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag, finally get a chance to even the score with the high life jet setting Miami's Sweet Heat for the brutal beatdown three weeks prior in The Main Event. Jessie Jones makes a deal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones strives to make good on her deal with McLane in her opening match against Genesis and be added to the Championship Challenge Main Event. Jennifer Florez challenges IQ Superior's Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone's got a problem with David McLane after last week's Championship Challenge Match. David placates the angry roster by offering all participants a chance at the new champion - who's more than willing to face each of them.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After two groundbreaking wins, Champion Abilene Maverick finally re-introduces herself to the WOW audience. Backstage, as teams start to assemble for The WOW Trios Tournament, Team Spirit has a major announcement with major ramifications.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Amber O'Neal by her side, Jessie Jones makes her intentions towards former tag partner Americana crystal clear. With Amber by her side, however, Jessie might just provoke another former WOW Superhero to step up. Gloria Glitter aims to make a stance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is tracking an escape artist who is forced to distract a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After watching her father stabbed to death, a grieving daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the slower-moving wheels of justice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is determined to debunk the dire menace posed by a marauding monster that has smashed mining camps, decimated an Indian village, and has the Nugget City residents hiding behind locked doors.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh, down on his luck, hires out for $100/day to find a woman - one catch is she may be dead.

programme.desc: Josh brings in \\"Doc\\" Phillips hoping he can lure Clell Fanning out as he has an old score to settle with Clell.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To net a thousand-dollar reward and save a friend, Josh saves Tolliver Bender from hanging so he can testify in a nearby trial.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: An attractive woman hires Josh for $1000 to clear her father on a false murder charge in a town that is not very welcoming to Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
